title: Principal Radiologist at Aster DM Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Aster DM Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Aster DM Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aster DM Healthcare:
Aster DM Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare!
